description: Immediately after a game, a social media manager needs to create and post highlight clips.

nodes.task_description: Access the full recording of the game broadcast.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the full video file.

nodes.task_description: Use an AI tool to automatically identify the most exciting plays (e.g., goals, big hits).

expected_outcome.value: The tool generates a list of timestamps for potential highlights.

nodes.task_description: Create short video clips for the top 3 highlights.
Post the clips to the team's social media accounts.
